item.title: A Love Triangle Takes a Dark Turn
item.description: A case involving a complex relationship is under investigation as authorities review the circumstances and key events involved.

media:content.media:title: A Love Triangle Takes a Dark Turn
media:content.media:description: A case involving a complex relationship is under investigation as authorities review the circumstances and key events involved.

item.title: A Family Seeks the Truth
item.description: A factual look at the Bratterstein case, exploring a family’s search for truth, key events, and developments in the ongoing investigation.

media:content.media:title: A Family Seeks the Truth
media:content.media:description: A factual look at the Bratterstein case, exploring a family’s search for truth, key events, and developments in the ongoing investigation.
